All 8 reviewers approved — full consensus! Please commit and push your changes now. Make sure to:
1. Stage all changed files + `.claude-sessions/`
2. Commit with a descriptive message per TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md conventions
3. Push to origin
4. Verify CI passes
</teammate-message>
